message:
chore: remove unnecessary clone in io_driver test, update issue tracker

- io_driver.rs: Remove redundant .clone() on driver before moving it
  into a thread — the original binding is not used after the move, so
  the clone was unnecessary.
- .beads/issues.jsonl: Sync issue tracker with latest status updates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
